title: 7 Best Mailchimp Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Looking for a Mailchimp alternative? We compare the top options by price, features, and use case.
h1: Best Mailchimp Alternatives in 2025: Honest Comparison
intro: While Mailchimp is a capable platform, it is not the right fit for everyone. Whether you need a lower price point, a different feature set, or a platform better suited to your audience, there are strong alternatives worth considering. This guide covers the best Mailchimp alternatives in 2025.
why_switch: You have outgrown Mailchimp's free tier limits
You need features that are not available on this plan
Pricing does not scale well for your subscriber count

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers. It distinguishes itself from Mailchimp through visual automations and subscriber tagging, making it a strong choice when those capabilities are a priority.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators. It distinguishes itself from Mailchimp through newsletter monetisation and ad network, making it a strong choice when those capabilities are a priority.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget. It distinguishes itself from Mailchimp through drag-drop editor and automation, making it a strong choice when those capabilities are a priority.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM. It distinguishes itself from Mailchimp through advanced automation and CRM, making it a strong choice when those capabilities are a priority.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing. It distinguishes itself from Mailchimp through email campaigns and SMS, making it a strong choice when those capabilities are a priority.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Mailchimp?
faq.a: MailerLite and Brevo both offer generous free plans that are worth considering as free alternatives to Mailchimp. The best choice depends on your list size and the features you need most.

faq.q: What is the best Mailchimp alternative for small business?
faq.a: For small businesses, MailerLite is frequently recommended as a Mailchimp alternative due to its low cost and ease of use. ActiveCampaign is worth considering if you need CRM features alongside email marketing.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Most competitors are similarly priced or higher at scale. Moosend and MailerLite consistently rank as the most affordable options with a comparable feature set.
